channel.title: Ui on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Ui on Arrans github.io

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is an open-source declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, JavaScript, or Python apps.

item.title: sveltejs/svelte
item.description: web development for the rest of us

item.title: shadcn-ui/ui
item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.title: nicbarker/clay
item.description: High performance UI layout library in C.

item.title: go-flutter-desktop/go-flutter
item.description: Flutter on Windows, MacOS and Linux - based on Flutter Embedding, Go and GLFW.

item.title: givanz/VvvebJs
item.description: Drag and drop page builder library written in vanilla javascript without dependencies or build tools.

item.title: arran4/kgithub-notify
item.description: A sleek GitHub notification system tray application written natively in C++ using Qt6 and KDE Frameworks 6 (KF6). It quietly monitors your GitHub account, notifying you when there are new notifications, and provides a rich desktop interface to manage themGithub notifier for KDE

item.title: flyerhq/flutter_chat_ui
item.description: Free and open-source chat SDK. Build fast, real-time apps and generative AI agents with a high-performance, customizable, cross-platform UI.

item.title: SebastienBtr/Dash-Chat-2
item.description: The most complete Chat UI for flutter. Easy to use, highly customizable and fully featured

item.title: tropicaaal/fluent-svelte
item.description: A faithful implementation of Microsoft’s Fluent Design System in Svelte.

item.title: zeozeozeo/microui-go
item.description: A tiny, portable, immediate-mode UI library ported to idiomatic Go

item.title: arran4/shineyshot
item.description: A simple screenshotting tool with several user modes

item.title: afonsocraposo/buttons_tabbar
item.description: A Flutter package that implements a TabBar where each label is a toggle button.
